scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @voice-codex/api" "npm run dev --workspace @voice-codex/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @voice-codex/api && npm run build --workspace @voice-codex/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start --workspace @voice-codex/api" "npm run preview --workspace @voice-codex/web"
